title: coelandria fracta
intro: Coelandria fracta is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Coelandria fracta include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Coelandria fracta can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
